content_angles.hook: How 'Judge Orders Government to Begin Refunding More Than $130B i...' connects to Gaza resilience
$1 gets you AI art. 70c goes to Gaza Rose Gallery. The loop funds itself.
I built an AI that earns money while I sleep and donates automatically.

listings.title: Desert Rose at Dawn
listings.description:
Desert Rose at Dawn - AI Digital Art Print

Impressionist digital artwork that carries meaning beyond aesthetics.

[ROSE] 70c of every $1 supports Gaza Rose Gallery - Palestinian artists & community relief.
[LOOP] 30c feeds the SolarPunk Loop - reinvested to generate more art, more support.

INSTANT DIGITAL DOWNLOAD
- 4000 x 4000px JPEG (300 DPI - print any size)
- Download immediately after payment
- Personal & commercial use included

YOUR PURCHASE MATTERS
This isn't just wall art - it's a small act of solidarity.
Every $1 automatically splits: artist support -> loop fund -> more art.
The loop feeds itself. Your $1 echoes.

revenue_inbox.subject: Don’t Miss Your Shot at a $100 Coupon
revenue_inbox.body:
Redbubble Hurry. Favorite a St. Patrick’s Day design and you’re entered.  ‌ ‌ 
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ 


 <https://www.redbubble.com/> 
  


One Day Left to Win a $100 Coupon! 
<https://www.redbubble.com/g/lucky-tee-giveaway>


Just make an account or sign in, then tap the heart to "Favorite" any St. 
Patrick’s Day design on Redbubble and you’re in!* 
<https://www.redbubble.com/g/lucky-tee-giveaway>


Find a Favorite <https://www.redbubble.com/g/lucky-tee-giveaway> 


 <https://www.redbubble.com/g/lucky-tee-giveaway>

<https://www.redbubble.com/i/t-shirt/Rainbow-Clovers-by-doodlebymeg/158926027.AIDLL>

person.
Eligible entries must be received between 12:00 AM local time on 3/2/26 and 
11:59 PM local time on 3/4/26.

pieces.title: White Doves Over Gaza
pieces.desc: Seven white doves ascending through golden morning light over ancient olive groves. Peace, hope, and the indomitable spirit of Palestine.

pieces.title: Ancient Olive Grove
pieces.desc: Thousand-year-old olive trees standing resilient against the Mediterranean sky.

pieces.title: Tatreez — Living Embroidery
pieces.desc: The geometric language of Palestinian women, woven across generations.

pieces.title: Gaza by the Sea
pieces.desc: The Mediterranean at dusk, its waters catching the last gold of day.

pieces.title: Star of Hope
pieces.desc: A single brilliant star above the ancient cityscape, surrounded by the warm glow of windows.

pieces.title: Pomegranate Season
pieces.desc: Deep crimson pomegranates split open on a mosaic table, seeds gleaming like rubies.

pieces.title: Night Garden of Palestine
pieces.desc: Jasmine and bougainvillea under a moon so full it turns night to silver.

kofi_setup_instructions: After creating item, copy its URL (e.g. ko-fi.com/s/xxxxx)

Re-run ART_CATALOG engine to rebuild art.html with correct URLs
